The engineer explained that the length of the room should be twice the width. Using the perimeter formula, 2*(length + width) = 36, the dimensions can be calculated. The length is 12 meters and the width is 6 meters. * * *  

The engineer emphasized the importance of accurate measurements to ensure the room is functional and safe. The calculations show that the length is 12 meters and the width is 6 meters. * * *  

The engineer also mentioned that the heart of the design lies in using the correct measurements. The heart of the room is 6 meters wide and 12 meters long. * * *
